title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Scootsy - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Scootsy - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Scootsy are looking for an experienced Reservation Manager based out of Ahmedabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Scootsy:
Scootsy is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in F&B Service

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Scootsy!
